1869770.name: Starlab
1869770.description:
ARRIVING AT EARTH

In Starlab you are a scientist who has journeyed to the long forgotten ruins of humanity's first star. Here you build compute across the solar system to continue your research into the end of the Universe.

A 2D SOLAR SYSTEM WITH REAL GRAVITY

Every planet pulls toward its own center. Walk around entire moons. Launch rockets that orbit, slingshot, and crash. The solar system is seamless—no loading screens between Earth and the outer reaches.

AUTOMATE EVERYTHING

Start with a pickaxe. End with automated extractors feeding refineries feeding factories feeding space cannons launching payloads between worlds without you. Your job is to build the system, then let it run.

DIE, CLONE, REPEAT

Alien swarms and rogue machines will hunt you. You'll run out of oxygen. Your rocket will miss its landing. Clone back at your Starlab and try again—your infrastructure survives even when you don't.

Key Features

  • Pilot rockets, trucks, and jetpacks with real fuel and momentum management

  • Automate extraction, refining, and manufacturing across multiple planets

  • Manage electrical grids with solar panels, power plants, and batteries

  • Research weapons, vehicles, and survival gear through a tech tree

  • Customize your scientist with gear and cosmetic options

  • Farm, Build, and Craft to establish permanent footholds
